description: Change-impact prediction models — Phase 10. Each entry predicts a speedup bracket for a single named optimization technique, derived from measured case studies in proven_optimizations.yaml.

id.description: Stable lowercase snake_case identifier. Becomes change_type argument on predict_change_impact.

applies_to.description: Precondition filter — technique only applies when the kernel matches.

required_metrics.description: Metric names that must be present on the baseline run for a prediction to be computed. Missing required metric => confidence=0 + tier-2 rationale.

model.description: Symbolic model used to derive a point estimate. Not evaluated — documentation only.

speedup_bounds.description: Catalog hi/lo (raw). predict_change_impact multiplies hi by 0.85 at emit time (conservative bracket).
